entities.description: The process of creating fuels from biological sources

entities.name: RENEWABLE FUELS

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Gases that trap heat in the atmosphere and contribute to climate change

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding technique used to introduce a specific trait into an elite line

entities.description: A breeding technique using molecular markers to track the introgression of a gene

entities.name: KASPAR ASSAYS
